CreateAnIpv6Gateway.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.name: Name of the IPv6 gateway
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.bandwidthInMbps: Bandwidth limit of the IPv6 gateway in Mbps
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.billing: Billing information. Currently only postpaid is supported
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for postpaid; required for prepaid
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1–65
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0–65
CreateAnIpv6Gateway.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection. Default is false, meaning deletion is allowed
